BBC NewsBBC News - News Front Page https://www.bbc.co.uk/news https://news.bbcimg.co.uk/nol/shared/img/bbc_news_120x60.gif英国广播公司新闻https://www.bbc.co.uk/news节点的 RSS 2026 年 3 月 18 日星期三 13:11:51 GMT Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.en-gb 15
Senegal say 'fight is far from over' after Africa Cup of Nations win overturnedThe Senegalese government calls for an "independent international investigation" at the Confederation of African Football after it stripped Senegal of the Africa Cup of Nations title. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cwygyq495j8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cwygyq495j8o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:54:19 GMT
Angela Rayner's explosive speech reignites leadership speculationThe ex-deputy PM did not name Keir Starmer in her attack on Labour's direction and policies - but she did not have to. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpd8d10n9x5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpd8d10n9x5o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 09:21:14 GMT
MSP rules out reintroducing assisted dying bill after electionLiam McArthur said it was time to pass the baton to someone else after five years of work on the now-rejected bill. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2r2qqw4npo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2r2qqw4npo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:58:27 GMT
Ukraine faces missile shortage due to Middle East war, says ZelenskyIn an exclusive interview with the BBC, the Ukrainian president says Putin wants a "long war" between the US and Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp8r813x66jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp8r813x66jo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 07:56:49 GMT
Total repression and air strikes bring unrelenting dread for IraniansTehran residents tell the BBC they're caught between US-Israeli bombing and an Iranian regime trying to reassert its power. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn9e0wrglgdo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn9e0wrglgdo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 00:07:36 GMT
Ad for AI editing app which said it could 'remove anything' banned The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent." https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2g8888q53o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2g8888q53o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 00:00:09 GMT
Adoption system leaves too many parents isolated, government admits after BBC investigationThe children and families minister for England apologises to families who have received "support from services that isn't good enough". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cddn18v959qo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cddn18v959qo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 05:57:25 GMT
Temperatures forecast to reach 20C in warmest day of the year so farTemperatures are on the rise again and it will feel like spring has returned. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cp8r3kgjmd5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cp8r3kgjmd5o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 08:22:43 GMT
People don't need to buy a vaccine, health secretary saysVaccines are being offered to 5,000 students at the University of Kent, where there is a outbreak, from Wednesday. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy9g98g9eexo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy9g98g9eexo#1 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 12:02:22 GMT
Woman describes her symptoms before being rushed to hospitalSpeaking from her hospital bed, the 21-year-old woman said her symptoms included a headache, hot and cold sweats, achey bones and vomiting. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c8xyxejx82qo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/c8xyxejx82qo#1 Tue, 17 Mar 2026 19:23:14 GMT
